name: Sequence Role — Non-Idle Lane Write Refusal
description: Evaluates whether the Sequence role emits non_idle_lane_write_denied when asked to seed a non-idle initial lane.
needs_llm: Recognizing a non-idle lane seed request requires semantic understanding of lane lifecycle rules.

parts.text: Admit the fixture-sequence-target pillar but set initial Lane to 'In Progress'.

rubric.criterion: Emits non_idle_lane_write_denied when asked to set a non-Idle initial Lane on admission, and refuses the non-idle seed
